panel.title: Support Ticket
panel.description:
Click the button below to open a ticket.
A team member will assist you as soon as possible.

ticketOpened.title: Ticket Opened

ratingRequest.title: How was your support?
ratingRequest.description:
Please rate your support experience for ticket **#{count}**.
Your feedback helps us improve.

closeReason.title: Close Ticket
closeReason.label: Reason for closing
closeReason.placeholder: Please provide a reason for closing this ticket.

messages.ticketAlreadyClaimed: ❌ This ticket has already been claimed by {user}!
messages.ticketLimitReached: ❌ You can only have **{limit}** open tickets at a time.
messages.blacklisted: ❌ You are blacklisted and cannot open tickets.
messages.noPermission: ❌ You do not have permission for this action.
messages.notATicket: ❌ This channel is not a ticket.
messages.onlyStaff: ❌ Only staff can perform this action.
messages.userAdded: ✅ {user} has been added to the ticket.
messages.userRemoved: ✅ {user} has been removed from the ticket.
messages.autoCloseWarning: ⚠️ This ticket will be automatically closed in **{hours}** hours due to inactivity.
messages.blacklistAdded: ✅ {user} has been added to the blacklist.
messages.blacklistRemoved: ✅ {user} has been removed from the blacklist.
messages.configError: ⚠️ Configuration error. Please contact the bot operator!
messages.snippet_not_in_ticket: ❌ This command can only be used inside an open ticket.
messages.snippet_list_empty:
ℹ️ No snippets are configured yet.
Copy `config/snippets.example.jsonc` to `config/snippets.jsonc` and adjust it.
messages.snippet_not_found: ❌ Snippet **{name}** not found. Use `/snippet list` for an overview.
